_comment: Copy this file to dart_define.json (gitignored) and fill in your project's values, then run: flutter run --dart-define-from-file=dart_define.json. The anon key is the PUBLIC client key (safe to ship in the app) — never put the service_role key here.
_comment_sentry: OPTIONAL crash reporting. Keep this EMPTY for local dev so `flutter run` stays dark (no dev-noise to Sentry) — the app runs byte-identically and SentryFlutter never initializes (see main.dart). Arm it ONLY for the RELEASE build with an extra flag: `flutter build appbundle --release --dart-define-from-file=dart_define.json --dart-define=SENTRY_DSN=<dsn>`. Get <dsn> from sentry.io (org ariel-tikshoret, project 'flutter', Settings -> Client Keys (DSN)). A DSN is a PUBLIC client-ingest key (send-only, safe to ship), NOT a secret like the service_role key. Config is crashes-only: tracesSampleRate 0, sendDefaultPii false. (The Supabase edge functions are already armed separately via the Vault secret 'sentry_dsn'.)
